transcript: Speaker A: তুমি কতদিন ধরে করছো? [How long have you been doing this?] Speaker B: হয়তো ১০-১২ দিন হয়ে গেছে। [Maybe it's been 10-12 days.] Speaker A: তাহলে এখন ভালো লাগছে? [So, do you like it now?] Speaker B: হ্যাঁ, I speak English very confidently now. [Yes, I speak English very confidently now.] Speaker A: ওহ দারুণ! ইংলিশ বলতে শুরু করেছো। [Oh great! You've started speaking English.] Speaker C: MySivi অ্যাপে ১ কোটি মানুষ একে অপরের সাথে কথা বলে স্পোকেন ইংলিশের প্র্যাকটিস করছে। তুমিও আজই শুরু করো ট্রায়াল, শুধু ১ টাকায়। [On the MySivi app, 1 crore people are practicing spoken English by talking to each other. You too start your trial today, for just 1 rupee.]
on_screen_text: Be polite and respect the other person's opinion. Avoid rude comments. Rani. Akash. practices for an average of 6 minutes/call. 28:13 minutes remaining for today's call. MySivi. Start English Learning - MySivi. 10M+ Downloads. MySivi Premium. ₹1. LIMITED TIME OFFER. Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today. 24/7 AI English Teacher. 500+ Exercises and Lessons. Unlimited Access.
summary: The ad features a simulated conversation between two users on the MySivi app, demonstrating how practicing for a few days boosts English speaking confidence. The narrator highlights that over 10 million users practice on the platform. It ends with a call to action to start a trial for just 1 rupee.
